time.c(3) Library Functions Manual time.c(3)

NAME

time.c - ⏱️ High-precision timing utilities implementation

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define SOKOL_TIME_IMPL

Functions


uint64_t time_get_ns (void)
Get current monotonic time in nanoseconds. uint64_t time_get_realtime_ns (void)
Get current wall-clock (real) time in nanoseconds. void time_sleep_ns (uint64_t ns)
Sleep for specified nanoseconds. uint64_t time_elapsed_ns (uint64_t start_ns, uint64_t end_ns)
Calculate elapsed time with wraparound safety. uint64_t time_timespec_to_ns (const struct timespec *ts)
Convert struct timespec to nanoseconds. void time_ns_to_timespec (uint64_t ns, struct timespec *ts)
Convert nanoseconds to struct timespec. bool timer_system_init (void)
Initialize the timing system. void timer_system_destroy (void)
Cleanup the timing system. bool timer_start (const char *name)
Start a named timer. double timer_stop (const char *name)
Stop a named timer and return elapsed time. bool timer_is_initialized (void)
Check if timing system is initialized. int format_uptime_hms (int hours, int minutes, int seconds, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format uptime as HH:MM:SS string. int time_pretty (uint64_t nanoseconds, int decimals, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format nanoseconds as pretty duration with spaces and configurable precision. int time_pretty_now (int decimals, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format current monotonic time as pretty duration. int time_human_readable_unsigned (uint64_t nanoseconds, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format elapsed time as human-readable relative duration (unsigned version). int time_human_readable (int64_t nanoseconds, char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format nanoseconds as human-readable relative duration (moment.js style). int time_human_readable_now (char *buffer, size_t buffer_size)
Format current monotonic time as human-readable relative duration. void adaptive_sleep_init (adaptive_sleep_state_t *state, const adaptive_sleep_config_t *config)
Initialize adaptive sleep state with configuration. uint64_t adaptive_sleep_calculate (adaptive_sleep_state_t *state, size_t queue_depth, size_t target_depth)
Calculate adaptive sleep time based on queue depth. void adaptive_sleep_do (adaptive_sleep_state_t *state, size_t queue_depth, size_t target_depth)
Calculate sleep time and immediately sleep for that duration. bool time_format_is_valid_strftime (const char *format_str)
Validate strftime format string against known safe specifiers. int time_format_now (const char *format_str, char *buf, size_t buf_size)
Format current time using strftime format string. asciichat_error_t time_format_safe (const char *format_str, char *buf, size_t buf_size)
Safe wrapper for time formatting with validation and error codes.

Detailed Description

⏱️ High-precision timing utilities implementation

Variable Documentation

lifecycle_t lifecycle

Lifecycle state machine for init/shutdown synchronization.

Definition at line 35 of file util/time.c.

rwlock_t rwlock

Read-write lock for thread-safe access (uthash requires external locking).

Definition at line 34 of file util/time.c.

Referenced by rwlock_destroy(), rwlock_format_state(), rwlock_init(), rwlock_log_state(), rwlock_on_rdlock(), rwlock_on_unlock(), rwlock_on_wrlock(), rwlock_rdlock_impl(), rwlock_rdunlock_impl(), rwlock_wrlock_impl(), and rwlock_wrunlock_impl().

timer_record_t* timers

Hash table of active timers (uthash head pointer).
